appShell.intro: Describe how you live or work. Apps, databases, dashboards, and workflows are built around you.
appShell.runtimeText: Live apps with databases, dashboards, and agent control
appShell.sourceText: Your process, turned into working software

pages.signInDescription: Enter your email and start building software around your life or company.
pages.storeDescription: Install new templates into your workspace.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDescription: Update the basics used to personalize agent responses.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface language for this browser.

files.title: Files
files.description: All files you have uploaded to agent chats.
files.emptyDescription: Upload files in an agent chat and they will appear here.
files.name: Name
files.deleteDescription: {name} will be removed from your files.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Tell us a little about you so the agent can adapt its tone and assumptions.

auth.emailDescription: Use one email for new and existing accounts.

hub.title: Hub
hub.description: Collect app ideas, artifacts, comments, and votes.
hub.noTopicsDescription: Create the first request for an app.
hub.commentPlaceholder: Add context, questions, or implementation notes
hub.signInToCreateTopic: Sign in to create a Hub topic.
hub.signInToDiscuss: Sign in to join the discussion.
hub.signInToInteract: Sign in to add artifacts, comments, and votes.
hub.artifactsHelp: Artifacts help AI build context of requirements and build what you exactly want.
hub.artifactTextPlaceholder: Paste text, notes, requirements, or reference content
hub.intentPlaceholder: I want to build a Pomodoro app for focused work sessions, breaks, tasks, and simple productivity analytics.
hub.initialFilesDescription: Attach any materials: images, PDF files, Excel spreadsheets, and more.
hub.deleteArtifactDescription: {name} will be removed from this topic.

desktop.emptyDescription: Install 100+ apps from the Store to add them to your desktop.
desktop.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the application service and all attached resources.
desktop.deleteBody: We will delete the databases, Git repository, source code, and all application data for {domain}.
desktop.confirmDatabase: I understand the databases will be deleted.
desktop.confirmCode: I understand the code and Git repository will be deleted.
desktop.confirmData: I understand all application data will be permanently lost.

userAgent.welcome: I can help you think across your apps and route app-specific work to the right project agent.
userAgent.placeholder: Ask about your apps or what to build next...

project.previewPending: The preview will load when the service is ready.

chat.welcome: I am attached to {name}. Ask me what you want to change or inspect.
chat.useModeLabel: Use mode is active. Click to enable Dev mode.
chat.devModeLabel: Dev mode is active. Click to return to Use mode.
chat.usePlaceholder: Ask the agent to use the app...
chat.devPlaceholder: Ask the agent to inspect or change code...

mcp.title: Connect MCP to ChatGPT
mcp.description: Use this app MCP endpoint in a custom ChatGPT MCP app.
mcp.publicUrlNote: ChatGPT must be able to reach this app from a public URL before it can connect to the MCP server.
steps: Open ChatGPT workspace settings and enable Developer mode.
Paste the MCP server URL and configure Bearer token auth.
Test the app and enable it in ChatGPT.

money.name: Money
money.description: Personal finance dashboard with own database.

kanban.name: Kanban
kanban.description: Visual task board for projects, cards, priorities, and workflows.

personalCrm.name: Personal CRM
personalCrm.description: Lightweight contact manager with notes, follow-ups, and relationship history.

habitTracker.name: Habit Tracker
habitTracker.description: Daily habit tracking with streaks, goals, and progress insights.

pomodoro.name: Pomodoro
pomodoro.description: Focus timer with sessions, breaks, tasks, and productivity stats.

notes.name: Notes
notes.description: Personal knowledge base with tags, search, and linked notes.

mealPlanner.name: Meal Planner
mealPlanner.description: Weekly meals, recipes, ingredients, and grocery planning.

workoutTracker.name: Workout Tracker
workoutTracker.description: Exercise plans, sets, progress history, and personal records.

subscriptionTracker.name: Subscription Tracker
subscriptionTracker.description: Track recurring payments, renewal dates, and monthly spending.

jobSearchCrm.name: Job Search CRM
jobSearchCrm.description: Manage vacancies, companies, interviews, offers, and follow-ups.

moodJournal.name: Mood Journal
moodJournal.description: Track mood, notes, triggers, habits, and emotional patterns.

bookingCalendar.name: Booking Calendar
bookingCalendar.description: Calendly-style scheduling app where people can book available time slots.
